calendar.matters:
MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Awarding Contractual Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF ALI ESEIFAN'S MOTION For Order Awarding Contractual Attorney Fees ($9,915) -- Granted -- no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Awarding Contractual Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Continued To Oct-08-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert M. sellards, Esq. of STUHR & MILLER 585-2122, for plaintiff Ali Eseifan, moving for an Order Awarding Contractual Attorney Fees
Ilene M. Hochstein, Esq., 650/877-8288, for defendant Constantinos Notas, opposing party

RULING:
Upon representation of counsel, the Court continued PLAINTIFF ALI ESEIFAN's MOTION For an Order Awarding Contractual Attorney Fees to October 8, 2003 to allow defendant Notas to object to motion if good cause shown. (301/JLW) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ilene M. Hochstein, Esq., 650/877-8288, mvoing to be relieved as counsel for defendant Constantinos Notas
Robert M. sellards, Esq. of STUHR & MILLER 585-2122, for plaintiff Ali Eseifan did not oppose to the motion

RULING:
Upon counsel's representation, the Court granted Counsel Ilene M. Hochstein's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT CONSTANTINOS NOTAS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-23-2003 Continued To Sep-24-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ilene M. Hochstein, Esq. of 650/877-8288, moving to Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT CONSTANTINOS NOTAS

RULING:
* NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER when the case was called. THE COURT's TENTATIVE RULING was "HEARING REQUIRED". Therefore, the Court denied the motion for failure to appear.
** Counsel Ilene M. Hochstein appeared after the hearing. Upon counsel's representation, the Court continued the hearing on Counsel Ilene M. Hochstein's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT CONSTANTINOS NOTAS to September 24, 2003. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
